title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
